title: Fix vendor approval flow

requirements.text: Fix the vendor approval backend logic so that when an admin approves a vendor via the ApprovalDashboard, the vendor's approval status is correctly updated in the backend state and persisted across calls.

quotes: Vendor approval does not seem to work

acceptanceCriteria: Admin can approve a pending vendor approval request from the ApprovalDashboard without errors.
Admin can reject a pending vendor approval request from the ApprovalDashboard without errors.
After approval, the vendor's status is reflected as 'approved' when queried from the backend.
After rejection, the vendor's status is reflected as 'rejected' when queried from the backend.
A vendor whose approval request is approved gains access to vendor-gated pages (VendorDashboard, VendorProducts) without being redirected or blocked.
A vendor whose approval request is pending or rejected is still blocked from vendor-gated pages.

requirements.text: Fix the frontend vendor approval flow so that the ApprovalDashboard correctly calls the approve/reject backend mutations, handles success and error states with toast notifications, and refreshes the approval list after an action.

quotes: Vendor approval does not seem to work

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Approve' on a pending vendor in ApprovalDashboard triggers the correct backend mutation and shows a success toast on completion.
Clicking 'Reject' on a pending vendor in ApprovalDashboard triggers the correct backend mutation and shows a success toast on completion.
If the approve or reject mutation fails, an error toast is shown to the admin.
The approval request list is refreshed/invalidated after a successful approve or reject action so the updated status is reflected immediately.
VendorDashboard and VendorProducts pages correctly read the updated approval status from the backend after approval and grant access without requiring a page reload.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
All Motoko logic must remain in the single main actor at backend/main.mo.
nonGoals: Changing the vendor registration form or submission flow.
Adding new approval statuses beyond approve/reject.
Modifying unrelated admin panels (orders, payouts, auctions, trade offers).
